response.justification: Bogdan brings strong software craftsmanship fundamentals and nearly 17 years of polyglot engineering experience, with current work at re:cinq directly touching MCP code generators and agentic workflows — a meaningful alignment with the role's AI-agent delivery focus. However, the role mandates 8+ years of production AI experience, and his AI-specific work appears to have begun only in April 2025, representing roughly one year of direct GenAI exposure. Python — the dominant language in the LLM ecosystem and listed as a primary technology — is entirely absent from his skills and project history. There is no explicit mention of RAG architectures, vector databases, or multi-agent frameworks such as LangGraph or CrewAI, all of which are central requirements. His high-throughput data integration background (millions of HTTP requests per second at Dunnhumby) and cloud work (AWS CDK at Optilyz) provide adjacent value, but the gap between general backend depth and the specific GenAI seniority this staff role demands is substantial.
strengths: Current hands-on work with Model Context Protocol (MCP) infrastructure and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq directly maps to the role's AI-agent delivery responsibilities.
Strong cloud and data-intensive systems background — AWS CDK, high-throughput microservices, event-driven architectures — provides a credible foundation for production AI infrastructure work.
Demonstrated staff-level technical leadership across multiple companies, including mentorship, community talks, open-source library authorship, and cross-disciplinary delivery.
concerns: AI and GenAI experience is limited to approximately one year (April 2025 onward), placing him well below the 8-year minimum the role explicitly requires for production AI solution development.
Python is entirely absent from listed skills and all project history; it is the primary language for LLM tooling, data pipelines, and AI frameworks central to this position.
No evidence of RAG architecture design, vector database usage, or multi-agent framework experience (LangGraph, CrewAI, or equivalents), which are explicitly required qualifications.

key_factors.factor: Missing Python and RAG/vector DB skills
